intel_overview.headline_zh: UPC裁决趋严与欧盟IP金融化加速
intel_overview.headline_en: UPC Rulings Tighten as EU IP Finance Accelerates
intel_overview.summary_zh: 2026年二季度，欧洲IP生态呈现“司法硬化”与“资产金融化”双轨并行态势。统一专利法院（UPC）通过倍耐力案等确立对侵权的强硬立场，并完善PMAC替代性争议解决机制；EPO审查向无纸化及AI辅助转型，电池技术领域申请激增。同时，EUIPO联手EIF推动IP融资，利摩日瓷器获批首个手工业地理标志，显示欧盟正强化IP作为核心经济资产的属性，监管与商业化闭环日益紧密。
top_signals: UPC米兰分院裁定中国轮胎商侵权，确立专利维权高压态势
EUIPO与EIF建立合作伙伴关系，正式解锁知识产权支持型融资
利摩日瓷器成为欧盟首个受保护的手工业地理标志，制度落地
英国UKIPO商标费率平均上调25%，增加品牌维持成本
cross_currents: 司法与行政协同：UPC判例正被纳入EPO审查指南，形成跨机构法律适用一致性
价值重构：从单纯权利保护转向IP资产金融化，欧盟着力打通IP变现通道
地域扩张：IP合作框架向西巴尔干及格鲁吉亚延伸，欧盟标准向外辐射
implications: 在欧中企需警惕UPC专利诉讼风险，特别是制造业领域，应提前布局FTO分析
利用欧盟新推IP融资机制，中国企业可探索以专利组合获取欧洲运营资金
关注英国商标成本上涨及二手市场打假指南，调整对英品牌策略与合规流程
watchlist: EPO 2027年指南拟强制要求指明修改依据及引用UPC判例的具体实施
PMAC调解与仲裁服务全面上线后的案件分流效果及费率结构
成员国对CJEU关于新闻出版者在线使用公平报酬判决的国内法转化

daily_report.headline_zh: UPC判例确立终审权，英国商标费涨25%
daily_report.headline_en: UPC Asserts Final Authority; UK Trademark Fees Rise Twenty-Five Percent
daily_report.executive_line: UPC上诉院确立直接裁决权加速诉讼终结，英国商标官费大幅上调增加维权成本，欧盟拟立法干预生成式AI版权。
daily_report.summary_zh: 本窗口期欧洲IP态势呈现司法效率提升与合规成本增加双重特征。UPC上诉院通过新判例明确其在撤销初审后可直接作出终局裁决，无需发回重审，显著缩短专利诉讼周期。英国UKIPO实施新费率，商标申请费平均上涨25%，并发布二手时尚防伪指南以应对假冒风险。欧盟层面，委员会确认将针对生成式AI对版权的冲击进行独立立法干预。此外，倍耐力在UPC米兰分院胜诉中国轮胎商，显示跨境执法力度持续加强。

storylines.what_happened_zh: 欧盟委员会确认计划进行新的立法干预，以应对生成式AI对现有版权框架的破坏。
storylines.why_it_matters_zh: 现有文本挖掘例外被认为失衡，新立法可能重塑AI训练数据获取与权利人的许可机制。

report_items.title_zh: 放心购买二手商品：避免假冒时尚新品指南
report_items.title_en: UKIPO Guidance on Avoiding Counterfeit Goods in Second-Hand Fashion Market
report_items.title: Shop second-hand with confidence
report_items.summary_zh: 英国政府发布新指南，旨在帮助消费者在蓬勃发展的二手市场中避免购买到假冒时尚商品。此前数据显示，四分之一的消费者曾在不知情的情况下买到假货。该指南支持购物者充分利用英国二手市场，同时提升对假冒产品的识别能力。
report_items.summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office has issued new government guidance designed to help consumers avoid purchasing counterfeit fashion items. This initiative supports shoppers in navigating the UK's growing pre-loved market, addressing concerns that one in four buyers previously acquired fake goods unknowingly. The guidance aims to enhance consumer confidence and awareness regarding product authenticity in second-hand transactions.
core_points_zh: 英国政府发布新指南，协助消费者在二手时尚交易中识别并避免假冒商品
背景数据显示，此前有四分之一的消费者曾在不知情下购买了假冒时尚产品
指南旨在支持购物者安全利用英国繁荣的二手（pre-loved）消费市场
core_points_en: New UK government guidance targets avoidance of counterfeit fashion in secondary markets.
Data indicates one in four shoppers previously bought fakes without realizing it.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，英国后续是否会围绕这类规则指引给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This publication highlights official attention to trademark infringement risks within the expanding second-hand economy. For rights holders, it signals a continued focus on consumer education as a complement to enforcement. Stakeholders should observe if this guidance leads to updated platform obligations or specific compliance expectations for resellers.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Brands operating in the UK fashion sector should review this guidance to align their anti-counterfeiting communications with official consumer advice.
Practice note: The guidance underscores the importance of clear authenticity markers for goods entering the secondary market to reduce consumer confusion.
What to monitor: Watch for any subsequent updates linking this consumer guidance to specific enforcement actions or platform liability frameworks.

report_items.title_zh: DPMA 2025年报：电池技术专利申请大幅增长
report_items.title_en: DPMA 2025 Annual Report: Battery Technology Patent Filings Surge Significantly
report_items.title: DPMA-Jahresbericht 2025: Patentanmeldungen zur Batterietechnik enorm gestiegen
report_items.summary_zh: 德国专利商标局（DPMA）发布2025年年度报告，重点统计了专利、实用新型等申请数据。报告显示，2025年公布的电池技术专利申请量同比增长25.8%至9090件。尽管德国本土申请显著增加并排名第四，但亚洲申请人仍主导德国市场的电池专利排名。此外，风能专利申请量亦有所上升。报告强调知识产权保护对进步至关重要。
report_items.summary_en: The German Patent and Trade Mark Office (DPMA) has published its 2025 Annual Report, highlighting statistical trends in patents, utility models, trademarks, and designs. A key finding is a 25.8 percent year-on-year increase in published patent applications for battery technology, totaling 9,090 filings. While Asian applicants continue to dominate the rankings for the German market, domestic filings from German companies and research institutions have risen substantially, securing fourth place. The report also notes an increase in wind power patent applications. Available in digital HTML and PD...
core_points_zh: 年公布的电池技术专利申请量同比增25.8%至9090件，创新动态加速
亚洲国家主导德国市场电池专利申请排名，德国本土申请大增位列第四
DPMA发布2025年报，涵盖专利统计及数字时代知识产权保护趋势分析
core_points_en: Published battery technology patent applications rose 25.8 percent to 9,090, reflecting accelerated innovation dynamics in the sector.
Asian applicants dominate battery patent rankings in Germany, while domestic German filings increased significantly to reach fourth place.
The report highlights rising wind power patent applications and provides guidance on digital brand protection and design rights.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，德国后续是否会围绕这类数据发布给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This data underscores the intensifying competitive landscape in energy storage within the German jurisdiction. Rights holders should note the strong presence of Asian entities and the growing domestic activity. Monitoring these publication trends is essential for understanding technological evolution and assessing the density of prior art in battery and renewable energy sectors.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: The surge in battery technology publications indicates a crowded art space, requiring careful due diligence for new R&D projects targeting the German market.
Practice note: The DPMA’s analysis combines national and European patent data effective in Germany, offering a comprehensive view of protection strategies employed by competitors.
What to monitor: Track the specific technical subclasses within battery and wind power filings to identify emerging sub-technologies and key active assignees.

report_items.title_zh: 2026年5月商标法律与实务概览
report_items.title_en: UKIPO Trade Mark Fee Increases Effective April 2026: Key Updates
report_items.title: Trade Mark Law & Practice at a Glance – May 2026 - GJE
report_items.summary_zh: GJE发布2026年5月商标法律与实务更新。核心事实为自2026年4月1日起，英国知识产权局（UKIPO）新收费标准生效，整体平均涨幅达25%。具体包括在线提交英国商标申请费由170英镑涨至205英镑，每增加一个类别的费用由50英镑涨至60英镑。
report_items.summary_en: GJE’s May 2026 trade mark law update highlights significant changes to UK Intellectual Property Office (UKIPO) fees. Effective 1 April 2026, new official fees came into force, representing an average increase of 25 percent across various procedures. Specifically, the cost for filing a UK trade mark application online has risen from GBP 170 to GBP 205. Additionally, the fee for each additional class included in an application has increased from GBP 50 to GBP 60. These adjustments impact the baseline costs for securing trade mark protection in the United Kingdom. Rights holders and applicants ma...
core_points_zh: 年4月1日起UKIPO新费率生效，平均涨幅25%
英国商标在线申请费从170英镑上调至205英镑
商标申请每增加一个类别的费用从50英镑上调至60英镑
core_points_en: New UKIPO trade mark fees took effect on 1 April 2026 with an average twenty-five percent increase.
Online UK trade mark application fees rose from GBP 170 to GBP 205 per application.
Fees for each additional class in a trade mark application increased from GBP 50 to GBP 60.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，英国后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: The 25 percent average fee increase materially affects the cost structure for UK trade mark registrations. In-house counsel and brand owners should recalibrate annual IP budgets to accommodate higher filing costs, particularly for multi-class applications. While the base filing fee rise is notable, the incremental cost per additional class also warrants review for portfolio optimization. Practitioners should ensure t...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Higher official fees require immediate updates to UK trade mark filing budgets and cost forecasts for rights holders.
Practice note: The increase in per-class fees may influence decisions on class breadth versus separate filings in portfolio management.
What to monitor: Future UKIPO communications regarding potential procedural changes or additional fee adjustments in other trademark-related services.

report_items.title_zh: 英国商标注册簿150周年：律所代理的标志性品牌回顾
report_items.title_en: UK Trade Mark Register at 150: Iconic Brands and Historical Milestones
report_items.title: 150 years of the UK trade mark register: iconic brands we represent
report_items.summary_zh: 为纪念英国商标注册簿成立150周年，D Young & Co回顾了自1876年首个商标（Bass红三角）注册以来的历史。文章列举了该律所代理的多个维多利亚时代起源的知名品牌，包括Grants Morella樱桃白兰地、Ardbeg威士忌、Listerine漱口水、Vicks Vaporub、Fairy肥皂、Anusol药品及Gillette剃须刀，并详述了它们在英国的首次注册时间与背景，展示了英国商标体系的长期演变。
report_items.summary_en: Marking the 150th anniversary of the UK trade mark register, D Young & Co reflects on historic registrations starting with the Bass red triangle in 1876. The firm highlights long-standing client brands such as Grants Morella Cherry Brandy, Ardbeg, Listerine, Vicks Vaporub, Fairy, and Anusol. These examples illustrate the continuity of protection for diverse goods, from spirits to pharmaceuticals, with many marks originating in the Victorian era. The analysis underscores the stability of the UK system, noting that early registrations remain active today alongside millions of newer entries, demo...
core_points_zh: 英国首个注册商标为1876年1月1日注册的Bass红三角，至今有效
律所代理的最古老商标为1876年注册的Grants Morella樱桃白兰地图形商标
列举了Ardbeg、Listerine、Vicks等品牌在20世纪初获得英国商标保护的…
core_points_en: The first UK trade mark, Bass red triangle, was registered on 1 January 1876 and remains protected today.
D Young & Co represents Grants Morella Cherry Brandy, its oldest client mark, registered in June 1876.
Iconic brands like Ardbeg, Listerine, and Fairy secured early UK registrations between 1903 and 1911.
report_items.insight_zh: 本文主要为律所品牌宣传与历史回顾，通过展示长期代理的经典案例体现专业能力。对于关注英国市场的企业而言，这些百年品牌的持续注册状态证明了英国商标制度的稳定性。实务中可参考此类长寿品牌的维护策略，但文中未涉及具体法律争议或最新审查标准变化，仅作历史性事实陈述。
report_items.insight_en: This retrospective highlights the longevity of UK trade mark rights, offering reassurance regarding the stability of the register. For rights holders, it emphasizes the strategic value of maintaining historic marks. While primarily illustrative, it reminds practitioners that early adoption of registration provides lasting competitive advantages and brand equity preservation across generations.
insight_points_zh: 英国商标注册体系具有高度连续性，早期注册品牌至今仍受保护
传统快消与医药品牌在英国商标历史上占据重要地位，注册历史悠久
律所通过展示长期客户案例，强调其在英国商标领域的资深经验与稳定性
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Historic brands demonstrate that continuous use and renewal can sustain trade mark rights for over a century, reinforcing long-term asset value.
Practice note: Early registration dates, such as those for Ardbeg and Listerine, show how foundational marks were secured before modern classification systems fully evolved.
What to monitor: Track the status of legacy marks to ensure compliance with current use requirements while leveraging their historical distinctiveness in enforcement.

report_items.title_zh: 上诉院即使初审未决亦将对关键点作出裁决
report_items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal Rules on Final Decisions and Legal Interest in Rematec v Europe Forestry
report_items.title: Court of Appeal to rule on major points even if missing from first instance decision (UPC_CoA_302/2025, UPC_CoA_305/2025)
report_items.summary_zh: 统一专利法院上诉院在Rematec诉Europe Forestry案中推翻曼海姆分院判决，认定专利有效且侵权。裁决明确：若独立权利要求无效导致撤销反诉失败，无需审查从属权利要求充分性；上诉院通常应自行作出终局裁决而非发回重审，除非例外情况；发布判决需证明原告存在合法利益。
report_items.summary_en: In Rematec v. Europe Forestry, the UPC Court of Appeal clarified procedural standards under the UPCA. It held that assessing sufficiency for dependent claims is unnecessary if revocation fails for the encompassing independent claim due to lack of legal interest. Under Article 75(1) UPCA, the Court of Appeal generally issues a final decision when setting aside a first instance judgment, including ruling on infringement. Referral back to the first instance is exceptional; the lower court’s prior omission of infringement findings, based on invalidity, does not typically justify remand. Additional...
core_points_zh: 若针对独立权利要求的撤销反诉已失败，因缺乏法律利益，无需审查从属权利要求是否充分公开
依据UPCA第75条，上诉院撤销初审判决后通常应自行作出终局裁决，包括对侵权诉讼作出决定
初审未裁决侵权问题通常不构成发回重审的例外情形；发布判决需考量原告是否存在合法利益
core_points_en: No legal interest exists to assess dependent claim sufficiency if revocation fails for the encompassing independent claim.
The Court of Appeal generally renders a final decision on infringement when setting aside a first instance judgment.
Failure of the first instance to rule on infringement due to invalidity does not normally justify referral back.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This judgment reinforces the UPC Court of Appeal’s role in delivering final resolutions, minimizing referrals back to the first instance even when infringement was not previously examined. Rights holders should anticipate comprehensive appellate rulings covering both validity and infringement. Furthermore, parties seeking publication of decisions must proactively substantiate their legitimate interest, as such orders...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Appellate proceedings may now conclude with binding infringement findings, reducing prolonged litigation cycles through remands.
Practice note: Claimants must explicitly plead and evidence legitimate interest when requesting publication of judgments under Article 80 UPCA.
What to monitor: Future applications of the ‘exceptional circumstances’ test for referrals back to the first instance under Rule 242.2(b) RoP.

report_items.title: BCF Global se distingue dans les classements français de Leaders League en propriété industrielle

report_items.summary_en: BCF Global has entered the French Leaders League rankings for industrial property expertise for the first time, marking a step in its international development. The firm achieved high notoriety recognition in three strategic categories: electronic, telecommunications and new technology patents; general patents; and physics, mechanics and construction patents. This distinction underscores BCF Global’s positioning in the European intellectual property market and its capacity to support innovative companies in protecting and valuing technological assets across Europe and North America. The recogn...
core_points_zh: BCF Global首次入选法国Leaders League工业产权榜单，确认其在欧洲…
在电子电信、一般专利、物理机械建筑三个战略类别中获得高知名度评级
强调由Marion Fauré和Philippe Thérias领导的跨大西洋一体化工…
core_points_en: BCF Global enters French Leaders League industrial property rankings with high notoriety status.
Recognition covers electronic, general, and mechanical patent categories within the French market.
Firm emphasizes integrated transatlantic patent services led by Marion Fauré and Philippe Thérias.
report_items.insight_zh: 此动态反映头部律所通过跨国协作强化专利组合管理能力的市场趋势。对于关注欧洲专利布局的企业而言，了解具备跨法域（特别是法美加）协同能力的服务机构有助于优化知识产权资产管理策略，需持续观察此类评级对法律服务选择的影响。
report_items.insight_en: This ranking entry signals BCF Global’s growing visibility in the French patent sector, particularly for clients seeking coordinated IP management across European and North American jurisdictions. The specific category recognitions provide a reference point for rights holders evaluating counsel for technical sectors such as electronics and mechanical engineering. For in-house teams, this highlights the value of firms...
insight_points_zh: 跨国律所通过整合欧美资源提升专利资产保护与商业化服务能力
行业评级机构对细分技术领域（如电子、机械）专业度的认可成为市场参考
需关注具备跨法域协同能力的服务团队在欧洲专利实务中的表现

Practice note: The firm’s transatlantic model offers a structured approach for managing IP assets across European and North American legal frameworks.
What to monitor: Future developments in the firm’s cross-border collaboration capabilities and their impact on multi-jurisdictional patent prosecution and enforcement.

report_items.title_zh: IPEC裁定：仅含通用词“easy”不构成商标侵权
report_items.title_en: IPEC Rules Common Word Easy Insufficient for Trademark Infringement Finding
report_items.title: IPEC insights: Easygroup v Easyfeetstore - easyGroup’s claims of…
report_items.summary_zh: 英国知识产权企业法院裁定，EasyGroup未能证明被告使用“EASYFEET”侵犯其商标权或构成假冒。法官指出，“easy”为描述性词汇，原告虽主张商标家族概念，但长期未能提供证据证明消费者将该前缀单独关联至原告。因缺乏商品相似性及混淆证据，侵权、声誉损害及商标无效主张均被驳回。
report_items.summary_en: The Intellectual Property Enterprise Court rejected easyGroup’s infringement and passing off claims against Easyfeetstore regarding orthopaedic insoles. The court held that the descriptive term “easy” alone does not establish a link to easyGroup’s brand family. Despite asserting rights across seventy-six prior claims, easyGroup failed to provide evidence that consumers associate the “easy” prefix exclusively with its entities. With no similarity in goods or services for most marks and no evidence of actual confusion, the court found no likelihood of confusion or unfair advantage. Consequently...
core_points_zh: 法院认定仅拥有通用词“easy”不足以判定EASYFEET构成侵权，该词具有显著描述性
原告未能提供证据证明消费者将“easy”前缀视为对其品牌的单独指代，混淆主张失败
因侵权及假冒主张不成立，基于此提出的被告商标无效宣告请求亦被法院驳回
core_points_en: Descriptive term easy alone insufficient to prove consumer association with easyGroup brand family without specific evidence.
Court found no similarity in goods or services and no actual confusion, leading to dismissal of infringement claims.
Invalidity claim against defendant’s trademark failed as it depended on establishing prior infringement or passing off liability.
report_items.insight_zh: 本案重申商标纠纷高度依赖具体事实。即便拥有庞大商标家族，若核心要素为描述性词汇且缺乏实际混淆证据，难以通过商标家族理论扩张保护范围。权利人需注重积累市场认知证据，而非仅依赖注册数量。
report_items.insight_en: This judgment highlights the limitations of trademark family doctrines when the common element is highly descriptive. Rights holders must substantiate acquired distinctiveness and consumer recognition with concrete market evidence rather than relying solely on portfolio size. For practitioners, it underscores the necessity of demonstrating actual confusion or a tangible link between marks in infringement actions invo...
insight_points_zh: 商标家族保护需以核心要素具备显著性及公众认知为基础，描述性词汇难获宽泛保护
实际混淆证据的缺失往往直接导致侵权及声誉损害主张失败，举证责任关键
后续应关注权利人在类似案件中是否能补充提交关于消费者认知的实质性市场证据
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Owners of large trademark families containing descriptive terms must actively gather evidence of consumer recognition to enforce rights effectively.
Practice note: Courts require proof that the common element signals origin specifically to the claimant, not just general brand awareness, to find infringement.
What to monitor: Future attempts by easyGroup or similar entities to supplement evidentiary records with detailed consumer surveys in subsequent enforcement actions.

report_items.title_zh: 指南：如何在二手购物时识别假冒时尚商品
report_items.title_en: UKIPO Guidance on Identifying Counterfeit Fashion in Second-Hand Markets
report_items.title: Guidance: How to spot fake fashion when shopping second-hand
report_items.summary_zh: 英国知识产权局发布指南，旨在帮助消费者理解如何识别在转售平台上销售的假冒产品，并提供举报相关 listings 的具体步骤。该文件属于官方发布的操作指引，聚焦于二手市场中的知识产权侵权识别与应对流程。
report_items.summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office has published guidance to assist consumers in identifying counterfeit fashion items sold through second-hand resale platforms. The document outlines practical steps for recognizing fake products and provides instructions on how to report suspicious listings. This resource aims to enhance awareness of trademark infringement risks within the secondary market, offering a structured approach for rights holders and buyers to address potential counterfeiting issues on digital marketplaces.
core_points_zh: 原文摘要显示，指南核心目的是帮助识别转售平台上的假冒产品
原文明确指出，指南包含举报可疑 listings 的具体操作步骤
core_points_en: Guidance helps identify counterfeit fashion products on resale platforms.
Document outlines specific steps for reporting suspicious listings.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，英国后续是否会围绕这类规则指引给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This guidance highlights regulatory attention to trademark enforcement in the growing second-hand economy. For brand owners, it underscores the importance of clear consumer education and accessible reporting mechanisms. Monitoring how platforms integrate these identification tips into their compliance frameworks may reveal evolving standards for intermediary liability and user-generated content moderation in the UK.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Brands should review if their anti-counterfeiting materials align with UKIPO identification criteria for secondary markets.
Practice note: The guidance emphasizes consumer participation in enforcement by providing clear reporting pathways for suspicious listings.
What to monitor: Observe whether resale platforms update their terms or detection tools in response to this official guidance.

report_items.title_zh: 量子计算第二部分：量子时代的知识产权
report_items.title_en: Quantum Computing IP: EU Patent Output Lags Behind Company Presence
report_items.title: Quantum Computing — Part 2: Intellectual Property In The Quantum Age
report_items.summary_zh: 本文指出专利对保护量子行业创新至关重要，涵盖硬件、软件及算法等领域。尽管欧盟拥有全球32%的量子科技公司，但其相关专利仅占全球6%，远低于中国和美国。不过，2021至2024年间欧盟量子专利申请量翻倍，显示意识提升。芬兰表现突出，在欧洲量子专利申请中排名第四。
report_items.summary_en: Patents are critical for protecting innovations in quantum computing, communication, and sensing. While the EU hosts 32% of global quantum companies, it accounts for only 6% of related patents, trailing China and the US. However, EU patent filings doubled between 2021 and 2024, signaling increased strategic awareness. Finland ranks fourth globally in quantum patent activity per EPO and OECD data. The analysis highlights hardware infrastructure, including cryogenic systems and error correction, as significant areas for patentable innovation alongside core algorithms and software.
core_points_zh: 欧盟量子企业数量占全球32%，但相关专利仅占全球6%，存在产出缺口
至2024年欧盟量子技术专利申请量翻倍，反映IP保护意识增强
芬兰在量子技术专利申请方面表现优异，居欧洲第四，体现其生态优势
core_points_en: EU hosts 32% of quantum firms but holds only 6% of global patents, revealing a significant output gap.
Quantum patent filings in the EU doubled from 2021 to 2024, indicating growing IP protection awareness.
Finland ranks fourth globally in quantum patent activity, highlighting specific regional strengths within Europe.
report_items.insight_zh: 欧盟量子产业面临专利产出与企业规模不匹配的挑战，但近期申请量增长显示积极趋势。从业者需关注量子技术快速迭代对专利生命周期的影响，以及欧洲在硬件基础设施等领域的专利布局机会。
report_items.insight_en: European rights holders should address the disparity between market presence and patent volume by securing rights in hardware infrastructure and algorithms. The recent surge in filings suggests a maturing portfolio strategy. Monitoring high-activity jurisdictions like Finland can inform competitive benchmarking and collaboration opportunities in the evolving quantum landscape.
insight_points_zh: 欧盟量子企业需加强专利布局以匹配其市场地位，弥补与中美差距
量子技术迭代速度快于专利审批周期，可能导致授权前技术过时风险
关注芬兰等欧洲国家在量子生态中的专利活跃度及潜在合作机会
insight_points_en: Client relevance: EU-based quantum entities must align IP portfolios with their market share to mitigate competitive disadvantages against US and Chinese rivals.
Practice note: Drafting strategies should encompass physical infrastructure, such as cryogenic cooling and control electronics, not just core quantum algorithms.
What to monitor: Track the sustained growth in EU quantum patent filings and specific national trends, such as Finland’s high-ranking performance.

report_items.title_zh: 欧盟版权与AI政策制定中的盲点？
report_items.title_en: European Commission Launches Targeted Copyright Initiative Addressing Generative AI Challenges
report_items.title: A Blind Spot at the Heart of EU Copyright and AI Policymaking?
report_items.summary_zh: 欧盟委员会发布证据征集令，确认计划对欧盟版权框架进行新的立法干预，重点解决生成式AI带来的挑战。该举措独立于正在进行的《数字单一市场版权指令》审查，后者预计不会重新开放文本。新倡议涵盖AI挑战、在线盗版、录音制品及研究例外等四个领域，旨在改善欧洲创意与创新环境。
report_items.summary_en: The European Commission has published a call for evidence confirming plans for new legislative intervention in the EU copyright framework. This targeted initiative, distinct from the ongoing review of the Copyright in the Digital Single Market Directive, aims to address challenges linked to artificial intelligence and other specific areas. The Commission expects measures to tackle market and technological developments associated with generative AI. While the Directive review proceeds in parallel without reopening its text, this new initiative covers four domains: AI-related creator challenges...
core_points_zh: 欧盟委员会确认计划进行新的立法干预，以应对生成式AI对版权框架造成的破坏
此次针对AI的措施独立于《数字单一市场版权指令》的平行审查，后者预计不修改原文
现有文本挖掘例外未能平衡技术发展与控制权，退出机制未成为有效的许可杠杆
core_points_en: Commission confirms new legislative intervention targeting AI challenges, separate from the ongoing CDSM Directive review process.
Initiative covers four areas: AI impacts, live event piracy, third-country sound recordings, and research exception harmonization.
Existing text and data mining exceptions failed to balance technology development with rightholder control and value participation.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类政策更新给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This development indicates that EU policymakers prefer targeted legislative fixes over comprehensive directive revisions to address generative AI. Rights holders and technology developers should anticipate new rules governing training data usage and opt-out mechanisms. The separation from the CDSM review suggests a faster, albeit potentially fragmented, regulatory approach to emerging AI copyright issues.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders and AI developers must prepare for new compliance obligations regarding training data and creator compensation models outside the current CDSM fra…
Practice note: The initiative’s broad scope beyond AI suggests potential legislative bundling, which may complicate negotiations and extend timelines for final adoption.
What to monitor: Watch for specific proposals on clarifying the InfoSoc research exception and introducing an EU-level secondary publication right alongside AI measures.

daily_report.executive_line_en: The UPC Court of Appeal accelerates litigation by issuing final rulings, while UK trademark costs increase significantly. Simultaneously, the EU confirms legislative intervention for generative AI copyright issues.
daily_report.summary_en: This reporting period highlights a dual trend in European intellectual property: enhanced judicial efficiency and rising compliance costs. The Unified Patent Court (UPC) Court of Appeal clarified its procedural authority in Rematec v. Europe Forestry, establishing that it may issue final decisions on infringement when setting aside first-instance judgments, rather than remitting cases. This precedent significantly shortens patent litigation cycles. In the United Kingdom, the Intellectual Property Office implemented a twenty-five percent average fee increase for trademark applications and renewals, effective April 2026. Concurrently, UKIPO released guidance to help consumers identify counterfeit fashion goods in secondary markets. At the European Union level, the Commission confirmed plans for targeted legislative intervention to address generative AI challenges within the copyright framework, citing imbalances in current text and data mining exceptions. Additionally, the UPC Milan Local Division ruled in favor of Pirelli against two Chinese tire manufacturers, demonstrating robust cross-border enforcement capabilities. These developments require rights holders to adjust budget fore...

EU Commission moved from discussion to confirmed legislative action on AI copyright.

weekly_report.headline_zh: UPC判例确立程序边界，英德商标监管趋严
weekly_report.headline_en: UPC Sets Procedural Boundaries; UK/DE Trademark Tightening
weekly_report.executive_line: 本周核心在于UPC上诉庭通过系列裁决厘清程序与实体界限，提升诉讼确定性；同时英国费率上调与德国恶意注册预警显示商标合规成本与风险双升。
weekly_report.summary_zh: 本周欧洲IP态势呈现“司法确权”与“行政收紧”双线并行。统一专利法院（UPC）上诉庭在语言使用、初步异议范围及终局裁决权上作出关键裁定，强化了程序效率与可预测性。与此同时，英国UKIPO大幅上调商标费率并发布二手假冒指南，德国DPMA警示恶意注册激增并聚焦电池专利增长。EUIPO则在名人姓名商标与公序良俗审查上展现灵活性与描述性认定的严格标准。整体而言，诉讼策略需更精准，商标布局需更审慎。

what_changed_vs_last_window: UPC上诉庭从个案审理转向确立程序性先例，特别是关于语言和异议范围的裁定。
英国商标官费显著上调，标志着后脱欧时代UKIPO财务自给策略的深化。
德国监管机构首次系统性警示AI辅助的恶意商标抢注行为，风险等级上升。
next_watch_72h: 关注UPC米兰分院对倍耐力诉中国轮胎案的具体禁令执行细节。
监测英国二手交易平台对新假冒指南的合规响应及下架机制变化。
留意德国DPMA是否发布针对恶意注册商标的具体驳回案例指引。
key_moves: UPC上诉庭准许在对方同意下使用英语进行口头听证，打破语言僵化。
UKIPO将单类商标申请费从£170上调至£205，涨幅达25%。
EUIPO大上诉委员会确立名人姓名在书籍娱乐类服务上的描述性认定标准。
DPMA数据显示亚洲企业在德电池专利申请占据主导，本土企业位列第四。
business_actions: 在UPC诉讼中，积极利用程序规则前言的灵活性，协商英语听证以降低成本。
重新评估英国商标组合，剔除低价值注册以应对官费上涨，优化预算。
在德国市场建立商标监控机制，重点防范利用AI生成的近似恶意申请。
watchlist: 欧盟生成式AI版权立法干预的具体草案内容。
量子技术专利在欧洲的布局速度与技术迭代周期的匹配度。
统一专利法院调解与仲裁中心（PMAC）成立后的案件分流效果。
weekly_report.weekly_thesis: 本周欧洲IP环境从“制度搭建”进入“精细化运营”阶段，UPC程序规则趋于成熟稳定，而各国商标局则通过价格杠杆和执法指南应对新市场挑战。
rising_themes: UPC程序规则的司法解释与先例形成
二手市场与循环经济中的IP执法
AI工具在商标恶意注册中的滥用风险
cooling_themes: 传统电商平台的常规商标投诉
regional_shift: UPC上诉庭成为程序规则确定的核心枢纽

strategic_implications: 跨国诉讼策略需从实体抗辩前移至程序博弈，利用UPC规则提升效率。
品牌方需区分“来源标识”与“内容描述”，避免在衍生品上过度主张名人姓名权。
企业需将二手流通环节纳入品牌保护体系，防止假冒商品通过合法二手渠道洗白。

report_items.title_zh: 放心购买二手商品：避免假冒时尚新品指南
report_items.title_en: UKIPO Guidance on Avoiding Counterfeit Goods in Second-Hand Fashion Market
report_items.title: Shop second-hand with confidence
report_items.summary_zh: 英国政府发布新指南，旨在帮助消费者在蓬勃发展的二手市场中避免购买到假冒时尚商品。此前数据显示，四分之一的消费者曾在不知情的情况下买到假货。该指南支持购物者充分利用英国二手市场，同时提升对假冒产品的识别能力。
report_items.summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office has issued new government guidance designed to help consumers avoid purchasing counterfeit fashion items. This initiative supports shoppers in navigating the UK's growing pre-loved market, addressing concerns that one in four buyers previously acquired fake goods unknowingly. The guidance aims to enhance consumer confidence and awareness regarding product authenticity in second-hand transactions.
core_points_zh: 英国政府发布新指南，协助消费者在二手时尚交易中识别并避免假冒商品
背景数据显示，此前有四分之一的消费者曾在不知情下购买了假冒时尚产品
指南旨在支持购物者安全利用英国繁荣的二手（pre-loved）消费市场
core_points_en: New UK government guidance targets avoidance of counterfeit fashion in secondary markets.
Data indicates one in four shoppers previously bought fakes without realizing it.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，英国后续是否会围绕这类规则指引给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This publication highlights official attention to trademark infringement risks within the expanding second-hand economy. For rights holders, it signals a continued focus on consumer education as a complement to enforcement. Stakeholders should observe if this guidance leads to updated platform obligations or specific compliance expectations for resellers.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Brands operating in the UK fashion sector should review this guidance to align their anti-counterfeiting communications with official consumer advice.
Practice note: The guidance underscores the importance of clear authenticity markers for goods entering the secondary market to reduce consumer confusion.
What to monitor: Watch for any subsequent updates linking this consumer guidance to specific enforcement actions or platform liability frameworks.

report_items.title_zh: DPMA 2025年报：电池技术专利申请大幅增长
report_items.title_en: DPMA 2025 Annual Report: Battery Technology Patent Filings Surge Significantly
report_items.title: DPMA-Jahresbericht 2025: Patentanmeldungen zur Batterietechnik enorm gestiegen
report_items.summary_zh: 德国专利商标局（DPMA）发布2025年年度报告，重点统计了专利、实用新型等申请数据。报告显示，2025年公布的电池技术专利申请量同比增长25.8%至9090件。尽管德国本土申请显著增加并排名第四，但亚洲申请人仍主导德国市场的电池专利排名。此外，风能专利申请量亦有所上升。报告强调知识产权保护对进步至关重要。
report_items.summary_en: The German Patent and Trade Mark Office (DPMA) has published its 2025 Annual Report, highlighting statistical trends in patents, utility models, trademarks, and designs. A key finding is a 25.8 percent year-on-year increase in published patent applications for battery technology, totaling 9,090 filings. While Asian applicants continue to dominate the rankings for the German market, domestic filings from German companies and research institutions have risen substantially, securing fourth place. The report also notes an increase in wind power patent applications. Available in digital HTML and PD...
core_points_zh: 年公布的电池技术专利申请量同比增25.8%至9090件，创新动态加速
亚洲国家主导德国市场电池专利申请排名，德国本土申请大增位列第四
DPMA发布2025年报，涵盖专利统计及数字时代知识产权保护趋势分析
core_points_en: Published battery technology patent applications rose 25.8 percent to 9,090, reflecting accelerated innovation dynamics in the sector.
Asian applicants dominate battery patent rankings in Germany, while domestic German filings increased significantly to reach fourth place.
The report highlights rising wind power patent applications and provides guidance on digital brand protection and design rights.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，德国后续是否会围绕这类数据发布给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This data underscores the intensifying competitive landscape in energy storage within the German jurisdiction. Rights holders should note the strong presence of Asian entities and the growing domestic activity. Monitoring these publication trends is essential for understanding technological evolution and assessing the density of prior art in battery and renewable energy sectors.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: The surge in battery technology publications indicates a crowded art space, requiring careful due diligence for new R&D projects targeting the German market.
Practice note: The DPMA’s analysis combines national and European patent data effective in Germany, offering a comprehensive view of protection strategies employed by competitors.
What to monitor: Track the specific technical subclasses within battery and wind power filings to identify emerging sub-technologies and key active assignees.

report_items.title_zh: 2026年5月商标法律与实务概览
report_items.title_en: UKIPO Trade Mark Fee Increases Effective April 2026: Key Updates
report_items.title: Trade Mark Law & Practice at a Glance – May 2026 - GJE
report_items.summary_zh: GJE发布2026年5月商标法律与实务更新。核心事实为自2026年4月1日起，英国知识产权局（UKIPO）新收费标准生效，整体平均涨幅达25%。具体包括在线提交英国商标申请费由170英镑涨至205英镑，每增加一个类别的费用由50英镑涨至60英镑。
report_items.summary_en: GJE’s May 2026 trade mark law update highlights significant changes to UK Intellectual Property Office (UKIPO) fees. Effective 1 April 2026, new official fees came into force, representing an average increase of 25 percent across various procedures. Specifically, the cost for filing a UK trade mark application online has risen from GBP 170 to GBP 205. Additionally, the fee for each additional class included in an application has increased from GBP 50 to GBP 60. These adjustments impact the baseline costs for securing trade mark protection in the United Kingdom. Rights holders and applicants ma...
core_points_zh: 年4月1日起UKIPO新费率生效，平均涨幅25%
英国商标在线申请费从170英镑上调至205英镑
商标申请每增加一个类别的费用从50英镑上调至60英镑
core_points_en: New UKIPO trade mark fees took effect on 1 April 2026 with an average twenty-five percent increase.
Online UK trade mark application fees rose from GBP 170 to GBP 205 per application.
Fees for each additional class in a trade mark application increased from GBP 50 to GBP 60.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，英国后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: The 25 percent average fee increase materially affects the cost structure for UK trade mark registrations. In-house counsel and brand owners should recalibrate annual IP budgets to accommodate higher filing costs, particularly for multi-class applications. While the base filing fee rise is notable, the incremental cost per additional class also warrants review for portfolio optimization. Practitioners should ensure t...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Higher official fees require immediate updates to UK trade mark filing budgets and cost forecasts for rights holders.
Practice note: The increase in per-class fees may influence decisions on class breadth versus separate filings in portfolio management.
What to monitor: Future UKIPO communications regarding potential procedural changes or additional fee adjustments in other trademark-related services.

report_items.title_zh: 英国商标注册簿150周年：律所代理的标志性品牌回顾
report_items.title_en: UK Trade Mark Register at 150: Iconic Brands and Historical Milestones
report_items.title: 150 years of the UK trade mark register: iconic brands we represent
report_items.summary_zh: 为纪念英国商标注册簿成立150周年，D Young & Co回顾了自1876年首个商标（Bass红三角）注册以来的历史。文章列举了该律所代理的多个维多利亚时代起源的知名品牌，包括Grants Morella樱桃白兰地、Ardbeg威士忌、Listerine漱口水、Vicks Vaporub、Fairy肥皂、Anusol药品及Gillette剃须刀，并详述了它们在英国的首次注册时间与背景，展示了英国商标体系的长期演变。
report_items.summary_en: Marking the 150th anniversary of the UK trade mark register, D Young & Co reflects on historic registrations starting with the Bass red triangle in 1876. The firm highlights long-standing client brands such as Grants Morella Cherry Brandy, Ardbeg, Listerine, Vicks Vaporub, Fairy, and Anusol. These examples illustrate the continuity of protection for diverse goods, from spirits to pharmaceuticals, with many marks originating in the Victorian era. The analysis underscores the stability of the UK system, noting that early registrations remain active today alongside millions of newer entries, demo...
core_points_zh: 英国首个注册商标为1876年1月1日注册的Bass红三角，至今有效
律所代理的最古老商标为1876年注册的Grants Morella樱桃白兰地图形商标
列举了Ardbeg、Listerine、Vicks等品牌在20世纪初获得英国商标保护的…
core_points_en: The first UK trade mark, Bass red triangle, was registered on 1 January 1876 and remains protected today.
D Young & Co represents Grants Morella Cherry Brandy, its oldest client mark, registered in June 1876.
Iconic brands like Ardbeg, Listerine, and Fairy secured early UK registrations between 1903 and 1911.
report_items.insight_zh: 本文主要为律所品牌宣传与历史回顾，通过展示长期代理的经典案例体现专业能力。对于关注英国市场的企业而言，这些百年品牌的持续注册状态证明了英国商标制度的稳定性。实务中可参考此类长寿品牌的维护策略，但文中未涉及具体法律争议或最新审查标准变化，仅作历史性事实陈述。
report_items.insight_en: This retrospective highlights the longevity of UK trade mark rights, offering reassurance regarding the stability of the register. For rights holders, it emphasizes the strategic value of maintaining historic marks. While primarily illustrative, it reminds practitioners that early adoption of registration provides lasting competitive advantages and brand equity preservation across generations.
insight_points_zh: 英国商标注册体系具有高度连续性，早期注册品牌至今仍受保护
传统快消与医药品牌在英国商标历史上占据重要地位，注册历史悠久
律所通过展示长期客户案例，强调其在英国商标领域的资深经验与稳定性
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Historic brands demonstrate that continuous use and renewal can sustain trade mark rights for over a century, reinforcing long-term asset value.
Practice note: Early registration dates, such as those for Ardbeg and Listerine, show how foundational marks were secured before modern classification systems fully evolved.
What to monitor: Track the status of legacy marks to ensure compliance with current use requirements while leveraging their historical distinctiveness in enforcement.

report_items.title_zh: 上诉院即使初审未决亦将对关键点作出裁决
report_items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal Rules on Final Decisions and Legal Interest in Rematec v Europe Forestry
report_items.title: Court of Appeal to rule on major points even if missing from first instance decision (UPC_CoA_302/2025, UPC_CoA_305/2025)
report_items.summary_zh: 统一专利法院上诉院在Rematec诉Europe Forestry案中推翻曼海姆分院判决，认定专利有效且侵权。裁决明确：若独立权利要求无效导致撤销反诉失败，无需审查从属权利要求充分性；上诉院通常应自行作出终局裁决而非发回重审，除非例外情况；发布判决需证明原告存在合法利益。
report_items.summary_en: In Rematec v. Europe Forestry, the UPC Court of Appeal clarified procedural standards under the UPCA. It held that assessing sufficiency for dependent claims is unnecessary if revocation fails for the encompassing independent claim due to lack of legal interest. Under Article 75(1) UPCA, the Court of Appeal generally issues a final decision when setting aside a first instance judgment, including ruling on infringement. Referral back to the first instance is exceptional; the lower court’s prior omission of infringement findings, based on invalidity, does not typically justify remand. Additional...
core_points_zh: 若针对独立权利要求的撤销反诉已失败，因缺乏法律利益，无需审查从属权利要求是否充分公开
依据UPCA第75条，上诉院撤销初审判决后通常应自行作出终局裁决，包括对侵权诉讼作出决定
初审未裁决侵权问题通常不构成发回重审的例外情形；发布判决需考量原告是否存在合法利益
core_points_en: No legal interest exists to assess dependent claim sufficiency if revocation fails for the encompassing independent claim.
The Court of Appeal generally renders a final decision on infringement when setting aside a first instance judgment.
Failure of the first instance to rule on infringement due to invalidity does not normally justify referral back.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This judgment reinforces the UPC Court of Appeal’s role in delivering final resolutions, minimizing referrals back to the first instance even when infringement was not previously examined. Rights holders should anticipate comprehensive appellate rulings covering both validity and infringement. Furthermore, parties seeking publication of decisions must proactively substantiate their legitimate interest, as such orders...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Appellate proceedings may now conclude with binding infringement findings, reducing prolonged litigation cycles through remands.
Practice note: Claimants must explicitly plead and evidence legitimate interest when requesting publication of judgments under Article 80 UPCA.
What to monitor: Future applications of the ‘exceptional circumstances’ test for referrals back to the first instance under Rule 242.2(b) RoP.

For in-house teams, this highlights the value of firms...

report_items.title_en: IPEC Rules Common Word Easy Insufficient for Trademark Infringement Finding
report_items.title: IPEC insights: Easygroup v Easyfeetstore - easyGroup’s claims of…
report_items.summary_zh: 英国知识产权企业法院裁定，EasyGroup未能证明被告使用“EASYFEET”侵犯其商标权或构成假冒。法官指出，“easy”为描述性词汇，原告虽主张商标家族概念，但长期未能提供证据证明消费者将该前缀单独关联至原告。因缺乏商品相似性及混淆证据，侵权、声誉损害及商标无效主张均被驳回。
report_items.summary_en: The Intellectual Property Enterprise Court rejected easyGroup’s infringement and passing off claims against Easyfeetstore regarding orthopaedic insoles. The court held that the descriptive term “easy” alone does not establish a link to easyGroup’s brand family. Despite asserting rights across seventy-six prior claims, easyGroup failed to provide evidence that consumers associate the “easy” prefix exclusively with its entities. With no similarity in goods or services for most marks and no evidence of actual confusion, the court found no likelihood of confusion or unfair advantage. Consequently...
core_points_zh: 法院认定仅拥有通用词“easy”不足以判定EASYFEET构成侵权，该词具有显著描述性
原告未能提供证据证明消费者将“easy”前缀视为对其品牌的单独指代，混淆主张失败
因侵权及假冒主张不成立，基于此提出的被告商标无效宣告请求亦被法院驳回
core_points_en: Descriptive term easy alone insufficient to prove consumer association with easyGroup brand family without specific evidence.
Court found no similarity in goods or services and no actual confusion, leading to dismissal of infringement claims.
Invalidity claim against defendant’s trademark failed as it depended on establishing prior infringement or passing off liability.
report_items.insight_zh: 本案重申商标纠纷高度依赖具体事实。即便拥有庞大商标家族，若核心要素为描述性词汇且缺乏实际混淆证据，难以通过商标家族理论扩张保护范围。权利人需注重积累市场认知证据，而非仅依赖注册数量。
report_items.insight_en: This judgment highlights the limitations of trademark family doctrines when the common element is highly descriptive. Rights holders must substantiate acquired distinctiveness and consumer recognition with concrete market evidence rather than relying solely on portfolio size. For practitioners, it underscores the necessity of demonstrating actual confusion or a tangible link between marks in infringement actions invo...
insight_points_zh: 商标家族保护需以核心要素具备显著性及公众认知为基础，描述性词汇难获宽泛保护
实际混淆证据的缺失往往直接导致侵权及声誉损害主张失败，举证责任关键
后续应关注权利人在类似案件中是否能补充提交关于消费者认知的实质性市场证据
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Owners of large trademark families containing descriptive terms must actively gather evidence of consumer recognition to enforce rights effectively.
Practice note: Courts require proof that the common element signals origin specifically to the claimant, not just general brand awareness, to find infringement.
What to monitor: Future attempts by easyGroup or similar entities to supplement evidentiary records with detailed consumer surveys in subsequent enforcement actions.

report_items.title_zh: 指南：如何在二手购物时识别假冒时尚商品
report_items.title_en: UKIPO Guidance on Identifying Counterfeit Fashion in Second-Hand Markets
report_items.title: Guidance: How to spot fake fashion when shopping second-hand
report_items.summary_zh: 英国知识产权局发布指南，旨在帮助消费者理解如何识别在转售平台上销售的假冒产品，并提供举报相关 listings 的具体步骤。该文件属于官方发布的操作指引，聚焦于二手市场中的知识产权侵权识别与应对流程。
report_items.summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office has published guidance to assist consumers in identifying counterfeit fashion items sold through second-hand resale platforms. The document outlines practical steps for recognizing fake products and provides instructions on how to report suspicious listings. This resource aims to enhance awareness of trademark infringement risks within the secondary market, offering a structured approach for rights holders and buyers to address potential counterfeiting issues on digital marketplaces.
core_points_zh: 原文摘要显示，指南核心目的是帮助识别转售平台上的假冒产品
原文明确指出，指南包含举报可疑 listings 的具体操作步骤
core_points_en: Guidance helps identify counterfeit fashion products on resale platforms.
Document outlines specific steps for reporting suspicious listings.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，英国后续是否会围绕这类规则指引给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This guidance highlights regulatory attention to trademark enforcement in the growing second-hand economy. For brand owners, it underscores the importance of clear consumer education and accessible reporting mechanisms. Monitoring how platforms integrate these identification tips into their compliance frameworks may reveal evolving standards for intermediary liability and user-generated content moderation in the UK.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Brands should review if their anti-counterfeiting materials align with UKIPO identification criteria for secondary markets.
Practice note: The guidance emphasizes consumer participation in enforcement by providing clear reporting pathways for suspicious listings.
What to monitor: Observe whether resale platforms update their terms or detection tools in response to this official guidance.

report_items.title_zh: 欧洲专利局SACEPO质量工作组最新会议亮点
report_items.title_en: EPO SACEPO Quality Meeting Highlights: 2026 Plan and AI Integration
report_items.title: Highlights from the latest meeting of the SACEPO Working Party on Quality
report_items.summary_zh: 欧洲专利局于2026年5月8日举办第16届SACEPO质量工作组会议，71名代表参会。会议重点讨论2026年质量行动计划进展、人工智能在提升审查质量中的应用及风险管控。局长强调质量为核心优先事项，并介绍了AI辅助起草工具等内部开发项目，旨在增强效率同时确保人类决策责任。
report_items.summary_en: The European Patent Office hosted the 16th SACEPO Working Party on Quality meeting on 8 May 2026, with 71 global representatives. Discussions centered on the 2026 Quality Action Plan, reviewing 2025 achievements in prior art access and examination harmonization. The EPO detailed its integration of artificial intelligence tools to enhance quality and efficiency, including applications in pre-search, oral proceedings minutes, and stakeholder queries. A new AI-supported drafting assistant for examiners was also highlighted. Participants acknowledged progress in consolidating best practices within...
core_points_zh: 会议回顾2025年质量成果，包括现有技术获取改善及审查实践协调进展
推进2026年质量行动计划，巩固主动检索部门最佳实践并加强异议部门学习
整合AI工具支持预检索及文书起草，坚持以人为本，确保审查员承担最终决策责任
core_points_en: EPO reviewed 2025 quality results, highlighting improvements in prior art access and examination practice harmonization.
The 2026 Quality Action Plan focuses on consolidating Active Search Division best practices and opposition training.
AI tools are being integrated for pre-search, drafting assistance, and legal platform responses to boost efficiency.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类官方动向给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: The EPO is actively embedding AI into examination workflows to support, not replace, human decision-making. For practitioners, this signals potential shifts in the speed and structure of office actions. While efficiency gains are anticipated, maintaining rigorous argumentation remains critical as examiners utilize new drafting aids. Stakeholders should observe how these tools influence the consistency of examination...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: AI-assisted examination may accelerate procedural steps, requiring timely and precise responses to maintain prosecution momentum.
Practice note: Examiners using AI drafting assistants may produce more standardized office actions; clear, distinct arguments remain essential for overcoming rejections.
What to monitor: Track the impact of AI tools on examination consistency and the EPO’s future guidance on algorithmic transparency in decision-making.

report_items.summary_zh: 2026年4月，欧洲专利局（EPO）顺利通过外部审计机构的管理体系ISO监督审核。此次审核确认了EPO在质量管理、职业健康安全、信息安全和环境管理方面的稳健性，维持了其ISO 9001、ISO 45001、ISO 27001及ISO 14001认证。这体现了EPO对国际标准及合规性的承诺，并通过综合管理体系支持高质量服务交付。
report_items.summary_en: In April 2026, the European Patent Office (EPO) successfully completed its periodic ISO surveillance audit conducted by external auditors. The review confirmed the continued robustness and maturity of the EPO’s integrated management systems, allowing the organization to maintain its certifications for quality management (ISO 9001), occupational health and safety (ISO 45001), information security (ISO 27001), and environmental management (ISO 14001). This outcome underscores the EPO’s adherence to international standards and regulatory compliance. By aligning policies, processes, and controls w...
core_points_zh: EPO于2026年4月通过外部审计机构的ISO管理体系监督审核
维持ISO 9001、45001、27001及14001四项国际认证，确认体系成熟稳健
通过综合管理体系整合政策流程，确保持续改进及服务交付质量
core_points_en: The EPO passed its April 2026 external ISO surveillance audit, confirming ongoing adherence to international management standards.
Certifications maintained include ISO 9001 for quality, ISO 27001 for information security, ISO 45001 for safety, and ISO 14001 for environment.
The EPO utilizes an Integrated Management System to unify policies and controls, supporting service quality and continuous operational improvement.
report_items.insight_zh: 此新闻属于EPO内部行政与合规动态，不直接改变专利实体法或审查标准。实务中需关注其信息安全（ISO 27001）与质量管理（ISO 9001）的持续合规，这间接保障了电子提交系统及审查流程的稳定性与数据安全性，是评估EPO服务可靠性的基础指标。
report_items.insight_en: This update confirms the administrative and operational stability of the EPO rather than introducing changes to substantive patent law or examination guidelines. For rights holders and legal practitioners, the maintenance of ISO 27001 and ISO 9001 certifications serves as a key indicator of the reliability and data security standards underpinning the EPO’s electronic filing systems and procedural workflows. While thi...
insight_points_zh: Client relevance/客户相关性: EPO运营稳定性与数据安全合规性保障
Practice note/实务观察: 关注EPO管理体系认证状态对服务连续性的影响
What to monitor/后续观察: 无具体法律变动，仅需知悉机构合规状态更新
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Confirms the stability and data security compliance of EPO operations, indirectly supporting the reliability of electronic submission channels and case processin…
Practice note: Monitor the status of EPO management system certifications as baseline indicators for service continuity and operational maturity.
What to monitor: No immediate legal or procedural changes; treat as routine compliance confirmation regarding institutional operational standards.

daily_audio_latest.headline_en: UPC Asserts Final Authority; UK Trademark Fees Rise Twenty-Five Percent
daily_audio_latest.summary_zh: 本窗口期欧洲IP态势呈现司法效率提升与合规成本增加双重特征。UPC上诉院通过新判例明确其在撤销初审后可直接作出终局裁决，无需发回重审，显著缩短专利诉讼周期。英国UKIPO实施新费率，商标申请费平均上涨25%，并发布二手时尚防伪指南以应对假冒风险。欧盟层面，委员会确认将针对生成式AI对版权的冲击进行独立立法干预。此外，倍耐力在UPC米兰分院胜诉中国轮胎商，显示跨境执法力度持续加强。
daily_audio_latest.summary_en: This reporting period highlights a dual trend in European intellectual property: enhanced judicial efficiency and rising compliance costs. The Unified Patent Court (UPC) Court of Appeal clarified its procedural authority in Rematec v. Europe Forestry, establishing that it may issue final decisions on infringement when setting aside first-instance judgments, rather than remitting cases. This precedent significantly shortens patent litigation cycles. In the United Kingdom, the Intellectual Property Office implemented a twenty-five percent average fee increase for trademark applications and renewals, effective April 2026. Concurrently, UKIPO released guidance to help consumers identify counterfeit fashion goods in secondary markets. At the European Union level, the Commission confirmed plans for targeted legislative intervention to address generative AI challenges within the copyright framework, citing imbalances in current text and data mining exceptions. Additionally, the UPC Milan Local Division ruled in favor of Pirelli against two Chinese tire manufacturers, demonstrating robust cross-border enforcement capabilities. transcript_lines_zh: 今天是2026年5月28日。以下是今天欧洲 IP 圈最重要的几条变化。
先看第一条，英国政府发布新指南，协助消费者在二手时尚交易中识别并避免假冒商品。后续要看英国会不会围绕这类官方动向继续给出配套安排或更明确口径。
再看第二条，年公布的电池技术专利申请量同比增25.8%至9090件，创新动态加速。后续要看德国披露的关键指标会不会延续当前趋势，并影响外界判断。
再看第三条，年4月1日起UKIPO新费率生效，平均涨幅25%。后续要看英国会不会出现进一步官方动作或配套安排。
最后看第四条，英国首个注册商标为1876年1月1日注册的Bass红三角，至今有效。值得关注的是，英国商标注册体系具有高度连续性，早期注册品牌至今仍受保护。
总结来看，今天的欧洲 IP 动态仍然围绕商标、专利、版权展开，接下来值得继续关注欧盟AI版权立法草案细节。

First, New UK government guidance targets avoidance of counterfeit fashion in secondary markets. Why it matters: Brands operating in the UK fashion sector should review this guidance to align their anti-counterfeiting communications with official c.

Next, Published battery technology patent applications rose 25.8 percent to 9,090, reflecting accelerated innovation dynamics. Why it matters: The surge in battery technology publications indicates a crowded art space, requiring careful due diligence for new R&D projects target.

Next, New UKIPO trade mark fees took effect on 1 April 2026 with an average twenty-five percent increase. Why it matters: Higher official fees require immediate updates to UK trade mark filing budgets and cost forecasts for rights holders.

Finally, The first UK trade mark, Bass red triangle, was registered on 1 January 1876 and remains protected today. Why it matters: Historic brands demonstrate that continuous use and renewal can sustain trade mark rights for over a century, reinforcing long-term ass.
Overall, today's European IP signals center on Trade marks, Patents, Copyright. The next point to watch is Details of upcoming EU legislative drafts on AI and copyright.

topics.headline_zh: UPC判例趋严与中国申请量跃升
topics.headline_en: UPC Precedents Tighten as Chinese Filings Surge and Unitary Patent Adoption Grows
topics.summary_zh: 2026年Q1-Q2，UPC上诉院确立终局裁决权及英语听证灵活性，地方法院在证据披露、权利要求解释上执行趋严。同期EPO申请量首破20万，中国跻身来源国前三，统一专利 uptake 率达28.7%。PMAC调解系统上线提供低成本解纷新径。
key_points: 司法程序明确化：上诉院可径直作出终局裁决；口头听证可依同意使用英语；初步异议仅限管辖权等程序事项。
实体审查趋严：米兰分院依据审查档案限缩保护范围；赫尔辛基分院严格适用等同原则；迟交证据因违反前置披露被排除。
市场格局变化：中国首次进入EPO申请来源国前三；统一专利请求量累计超8.6万，中小企业参与度显著提升。
actions: 诉讼策略调整：严守UPC证据前置披露时限，确保授权阶段陈述与诉讼主张一致，避免审查档案禁反言。
布局优化：利用PMAC在线调解机制处理SEP/FRAND纠纷以降低维权成本；针对核心产品评估统一专利性价比。
风险管控：关注杜塞尔多夫等热门分院判例，警惕零部件单独销售被认定为直接侵权的风险，优化权利要求撰写。
watchlist: EPO 2027指南修订中关于修改依据强制指明的具体义务
UPC上诉法院就管辖权范围向欧盟法院提请裁决的最终结果
集中式补充保护证书（SPC）制度立法进展及UPC管辖权确认
topics.summary_en: During the first half of 2026, the Unified Patent Court (UPC) clarified procedural standards, with the Court of Appeal asserting authority to issue final decisions and allowing English-language hearings by consent. Local divisions enforced stricter rules on evidence disclosure and claim interpretation, limiting protection scopes based on prosecution history. Concurrently, European Patent Office filings exceeded 200,000 for the first time, with China entering the top three source countries. Unitary Patent uptake reached 28.7%, driven significantly by small and medium-sized enterprises. The Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre (PMAC) launched its case management system, offering new pathways for cost-effective dispute resolution. These developments signal a maturing litigation landscape requiring rigorous procedural compliance and strategic portfolio assessment for rights holders operat...
key_points_en: Procedural clarity: The UPC Court of Appeal can render final decisions on infringement when setting aside lower court judgments, and oral proceedings may be conducted in English up...
Stricter substantive review: Local divisions are applying rigorous standards for evidence disclosure and claim interpretation, including strict adherence to prosecution history est...
Market shifts: China has become a top-three source of EPO applications, while Unitary Patent requests surpassed 86,000, reflecting strong adoption rates among European SMEs and glo...
actions_en: Adjust litigation strategy: Strictly adhere to UPC deadlines for evidence disclosure and ensure consistency between prosecution statements and litigation arguments to avoid estoppe...
Optimize portfolio management: Evaluate the cost-benefit of Unitary Patents for core products and utilize the new PMAC mediation framework for SEP/FRAND disputes to reduce enforcem...
Mitigate infringement risks: Monitor precedents from high-volume divisions like Düsseldorf regarding direct infringement theories, particularly concerning component sales, and refi...
watchlist_en: EPO Guidelines 2027 updates regarding mandatory indication of amendment bases and integration of UPC case law into examination practices.
Final outcomes of referrals to the Court of Justice of the European Union concerning the scope of UPC jurisdiction.
Legislative progress on the centralized Supplementary Protection Certificate (SPC) system and confirmation of UPC jurisdiction over SPC validity.

topics.headline_zh: 欧SEP司法博弈加剧与许可策略重塑
topics.headline_en: Intensifying EU SEP Litigation and Strategic Licensing Shifts
topics.summary_zh: 2026年欧洲SEP领域呈现UPC管辖权扩张与英德法院费率裁定并行的复杂态势。NPE活跃引发禁诉令冲突，英国转向仲裁机制，德国法院尝试费率设定。汽车与流媒体成维权热点，Avanci等专利池签约加速。中英判决冲突凸显全球合规风险，企业需重构应对策略。
key_points: UPC成为NPE战略高地，频繁签发针对中国法院的反反诉禁令，管辖权争议激化。
英国上诉法院推动FRAND争议向仲裁转移，同时英高院确立包含非FRAND因素的费率裁定标准。
汽车与流媒体行业许可密集落地，Avanci签约多家中国车企，但司法碎片化导致全球费率冲突。
actions: 审查许可协议中UPC退出机制及决策权归属，评估被集中无效的风险。
建立SEP前置谈判合规流程，收到侵权通知须立即书面表达许可意愿以保留抗辩权。
针对英中法院潜在判决冲突，制定全球诉讼统筹策略，避免陷入被动禁诉令局面。
watchlist: 英国最高法院重大FRAND案件最终裁决及其对全球费率设定的影响。
UPC上诉法院关于国际管辖权界限及临时禁令中专利修改的后续判例。
欧盟修订版TTBER实施后，对专利池及集体谈判的反垄断合规新要求。

insight_cards.insight_zh: 许可动作已经从背景变量变成当前主线，说明专利池扩围、费率博弈和双边谈判正在持续抬高经营准备门槛。
insight_cards.insight_en: Licensing has moved from a background factor to the main storyline, showing pools, rate-setting, and bilateral talks are raising the preparation bar.
insight_cards.action_zh: 优先把许可覆盖、费率对标和 willing licensee 证据准备前置。
insight_cards.action_en: Front-load licence coverage checks, rate benchmarking, and willing-licensee evidence.

insight_cards.insight_zh: 欧洲层面是近120天最活跃的场域，英国紧随其后，争议正在形成多法域联动。
insight_cards.insight_en: Europe-wide is the busiest forum in the recent window, with United Kingdom close behind, pointing to multi-forum spillover.
insight_cards.action_zh: 优先盯住 欧洲层面 的裁判与程序变化，并同步观察外溢到其他法域的连锁影响。

insight_cards.insight_zh: 近120天中企相关信号共有 35 条，占近期样本 32%。重点企业包括 ZTE / Huawei / Oppo。
insight_cards.insight_en: There are 35 China-related signals in the recent 120-day window, or 32% of the sample. Focus companies include ZTE / Huawei / Oppo.
insight_cards.action_zh: 把许可准备、诉讼预案和客户交付协同放到同一张经营清单里，不要只按单案应对。
insight_cards.action_en: Put licensing readiness, litigation planning, and customer-delivery coordination on the same operating checklist rather than treating them as one-off disputes.

insight_cards.insight_zh: 当前约 96% 的专题样本基于全文或公开预览分析，摘要级样本主要用于补趋势，不宜单独放大解读。

insight_cards.action_zh: 对涉及重大经营判断的节点，优先回到原文或公开预览核实，再决定是否升级为重点预警。

topics.china_impact_summary_zh: 这条长窗显示，SEP 风险已经从传统通信终端延伸到车载与 IoT，并在德国、英国和 UPC 三条诉讼线同步抬升。对中国企业来说，下一阶段重点不只是单案应对，而是把许可准备、诉讼预案和规则跟踪并行推进。
china_action_points: 涉及车载、蜂窝、Wi-Fi 或 IoT 出海业务的中国企业，应尽快核查专利池与双边许可覆盖，避免产品上市后再被动补谈。
在德国、英国和 UPC 有销售、供应链或客户落点的企业，应同步准备 FRAND 谈判材料、可比许可证据与禁令应对预案。
法务、标准与商务团队需要持续跟踪英欧 SEP 政策和竞争法变化，避免沿用单一市场的许可策略应对欧洲。
针对已进入欧洲市场的中国终端、部件与整车企业，建议把 SEP 许可预算、争议升级路径和管辖博弈纳入年度经营安排。

topics.summary_en: The European SEP landscape in 2026 is defined by the Unified Patent Court’s expanding jurisdiction and parallel rate-setting activities in UK and German courts. Non-practicing entities are increasingly utilizing the UPC, leading to heightened conflicts over anti-anti-suit injunctions, particularly against Chinese interim licenses. Simultaneously, the UK judiciary is steering FRAND disputes toward arbitration while establishing new standards for rate determinations. The automotive and streaming sectors remain primary enforcement targets, with patent pools like Avanci accelerating licensing deals. However, conflicting judgments between jurisdictions create significant global compliance risks. Companies must navigate this fragmented environment by addressing jurisdictional boundaries, procedural fairness in FRAND defenses, and the strategic implications of centralized validity challenges un...
key_points_en: The UPC has become a strategic venue for non-practicing entities, frequently issuing anti-anti-suit injunctions that intensify jurisdictional conflicts with Asian courts.
UK courts are promoting arbitration for FRAND disputes while refining rate-setting methodologies, contrasting with German and UPC approaches to global licensing terms.
Licensing activity is surging in the automotive and streaming sectors, yet judicial fragmentation continues to drive conflicting global rate obligations and compliance challenges.
actions_en: Review license agreements to clarify opt-out authority and decision-making rights for Unitary Patents, mitigating risks from centralized validity attacks.
Establish compliant pre-litigation negotiation protocols, ensuring prompt written expressions of licensing willingness to preserve FRAND defenses against injunctions.
Develop coordinated global litigation strategies to manage potential conflicts between UK, Chinese, and UPC judgments, avoiding passive exposure to anti-suit measures.
watchlist_en: Final rulings from the UK Supreme Court on major FRAND cases and their impact on global royalty rate benchmarks.
UPC Court of Appeal precedents defining international jurisdiction limits and procedural standards for patent amendments in preliminary injunction proceedings.
Antitrust compliance requirements for patent pools and collective negotiations following the implementation of the revised EU Technology Transfer Block Exemption Regulation.

topics.headline_en: EUIPO Strengthens Enforcement, Clarifies Post-Brexit Rights, and Expands IP Financing
topics.summary_zh: 本季度EUIPO聚焦打击网络假冒与药品侵权，推出IPEP数字执法工具。法院明确脱欧后英国权利失效及名人姓名注册限制。同时，EUIPO联合EIF解锁IP融资，DesignView升级全球搜索。中小企业基金持续降低注册成本，建议企业利用合规工具与补贴政策优化欧盟布局。
key_points: 司法与审查收紧：法院撤销“Obelix”商标无效决定，强调声誉评估完整性；裁定脱欧过渡期后纯英国在先权利不得阻碍欧盟商标注册；拒绝“GEORGE ORWELL”注册，认定名人姓名在内容类产品上具描述性。
执法数字化与协同：EUIPO支持SHIELD VI打假行动，上线IPEP门户及移动应用强化实时执法协作；与欧盟委员会联手打击网络盗版，Agorateka网络覆盖全部27个成员国。
商业价值与资助：EUIPO与EIF合作解锁IP支持型融资；DesignView成为全球最大外观图像搜索引擎；2026年中小企业基金继续补贴商标申请成本，降低进入门槛。
actions: 排查英国权利风险：若依赖未注册商标异议欧盟申请，需确认权利在欧盟境内的有效性，避免仅凭英国法权利被驳回。
利用数字化工具维权：注册并使用IPEP平台监控侵权线索，利用DesignView进行外观设计查重与检索，提升确权与维权效率。
申请 SME 基金补贴：符合条件的中小企业应积极申请EUIPO费用报销，降低欧盟商标及外观注册成本，优化预算配置。
watchlist: 德国恶意注册趋势：关注DPMA关于AI工具滥用导致恶意申请激增的动态，提前布局防御性注册。
IP融资机制落地：跟踪EUIPO与EIF合作的具体融资产品细则，探索将知识产权资产转化为流动资金的途径。
手工艺地理标志新规：留意CIGI咨询委员会后续发布的工业品地理标志保护具体操作指南，拓展保护维度。
topics.summary_en: The European Union Intellectual Property Office (EUIPO) has intensified efforts against online counterfeiting and pharmaceutical infringement through digital tools like the IP Enforcement Portal (IPEP). Recent judicial decisions clarify that UK-only rights cannot support EU trademark oppositions post-Brexit transition and restrict registering famous names for content-related goods. Concurrently, EUIPO partnered with the European Investment Fund to facilitate IP-backed financing for innovative firms. DesignView has evolved into the world’s largest design image search engine, enhancing global prior art checks. The SME Fund continues to subsidize registration costs, while new advisory boards address craft and industrial geographical indications. These developments underscore the strategic value of registered IP for revenue growth and investment attraction.
key_points_en: Judicial precedents confirm UK-only rights lack standing in post-transition EU oppositions and restrict famous name registrations for descriptive content.
Digital enforcement expands via IPEP tools and cross-border operations like SHIELD VI, targeting counterfeit medicines and organized crime networks.
Commercial opportunities grow through EUIPO-EIF IP financing partnerships, DesignView’s global search capabilities, and continued SME cost subsidies.
actions_en: Audit opposition strategies to ensure cited earlier rights remain legally effective in the EU at the time of EUIPO decisions.
Leverage IPEP for real-time enforcement collaboration and DesignView for comprehensive global design clearance and prior art searches.
Apply for SME Fund reimbursements to offset EU trademark and design filing costs and optimize IP budget allocation.
watchlist_en: Monitor rising bad faith trademark filings in Germany driven by AI tools targeting unregistered third-party signs.
Track detailed implementation guidelines for EUIPO-EIF IP-backed financing products to leverage intangible assets for capital access.
Observe Advisory Board outputs on craft and industrial geographical indications to anticipate new protection frameworks and evidence requirements.

topics.headline_zh: 欧英强化假冒执法与资金保障
topics.headline_en: EU and UK Strengthen Counterfeit Enforcement Through Funding and Coordination
topics.summary_zh: 欧盟与英国近期显著升级假冒打击力度。EUIPO联合欧盟委员会聚焦网络侵权，并支持SHIELD VI等跨国行动；英国UKIPO确认IP犯罪部门资金延至2029年并计划扩编。执法呈现跨机构协作、针对有组织犯罪及线上化趋势，中企需警惕供应链合规风险及更严厉的刑事追责。
key_points: 欧盟层面：EUIPO与欧盟委员会联手打击网络假冒，并通过EMPACT框架强化对有组织知识产权犯罪的跨机构协作与公众沟通。
英国层面：UKIPO确认IP犯罪专项执法资金延长至2029年，并计划扩大部门规模，显示长期高压执法态势。
行动实效：SHIELD VI行动查获3200万欧元假冒药品，凸显欧洲当局对高风险品类（如医药、耗材）的精准打击能力。
actions: 建立全链条合规溯源体系，确保出口产品（特别是耗材、医药相关）来源清晰，防范被卷入假冒供应链指控。
加强英国及欧盟进口商/分销商的尽职调查，避免采购不明来源低价商品，切断潜在侵权关联。
关注EUIPO关于在线侵权的最新口径，提前排查电商平台Listing风险，配合品牌保护策略调整。
watchlist: 欧盟后续针对网络假冒和盗版联合行动的具体配套措施及明确执法口径。
英国IP犯罪部门扩编的具体时间表、职能范围变化及2029年前的案件查处数据。
EMPACT框架下知识产权犯罪执法的优先事项变化及跨机构协作动态。
topics.topic_name_zh: 假冒执法 / 品牌保护
topics.summary_en: European and United Kingdom authorities have significantly intensified efforts to combat intellectual property infringement. The European Union Intellectual Property Office (EUIPO) and the European Commission launched a joint initiative targeting online counterfeiting, while reinforcing cross-agency collaboration against organized crime under the EMPACT framework. Recent operations, such as SHIELD VI, demonstrated effective enforcement with substantial seizures of counterfeit pharmaceuticals. Concurrently, the UK Intellectual Property Office confirmed extended funding for its specialist IP Crime Unit through 2029 and indicated plans for operational expansion. This sustained regulatory focus highlights a shift toward stricter criminal accountability and enhanced digital monitoring. Rights holders must adapt by strengthening supply chain due diligence and aligning brand protection strategi...
key_points_en: The EUIPO and European Commission have formalized joint actions against online counterfeiting, enhancing institutional coordination within the EMPACT framework to dismantle organiz...
The UK government extended funding for the specialist IP Crime Unit until 2029 and is exploring capacity expansion, signaling a long-term commitment to high-pressure enforcement.
Operation SHIELD VI resulted in the seizure of EUR 32 million in counterfeit medicines, illustrating the heightened efficacy of cross-border actions against high-risk product categ...
actions_en: Implement comprehensive supply chain traceability systems to verify product origins, particularly for pharmaceuticals and consumables, reducing exposure to counterfeit infiltration...
Conduct rigorous due diligence on EU and UK distributors and importers to prevent procurement of illegitimate goods and sever potential links to infringing supply chains.
Monitor evolving EUIPO guidelines on digital enforcement and proactively audit e-commerce listings to align with updated anti-counterfeiting protocols and platform compliance requi...
watchlist_en: Specific operational measures and enforcement criteria emerging from the EU joint action against online counterfeiting and piracy.
Timelines for the UK IP Crime Unit’s expansion, changes in functional scope, and enforcement statistics leading up to 2029.
Shifts in strategic priorities and inter-agency dynamics within the EMPACT framework regarding intellectual property crime enforcement.
